prompt: Wide architectural interior of a New England colonial entry foyer, full-height horizontal shiplap walls painted bright bone white with visible nickel-gap shadow lines. Wide-plank knotty pine flooring runs into the frame, lightly satin-finished and showing real grain. A black iron stair rail anchors the right side, a dark oak bench on the left holds a folded canvas drop cloth. Shot with a 24mm lens at eye level, overcast natural daylight pours through a sidelight beside the front door, creating cool even illumination with no hot spots. High-contrast slightly desaturated photography, only brand red appears as a small painter's tape roll on the bench. Working-contractor catalog feel, NOT HGTV bright. Documentary, no readable text, no logos.
